phase: Phase D - Platform, Owner Evidence, And Measurement Readiness

repo.evidence: D-1 through D-5 source and evidence artifacts were reviewed; source guards and contracts exist, with owner/platform blockers carried.

local_gate.evidence: i18n, content-claims, static assets, sitemap, Merchant feed, commerce, checkout, route migration, and private-route checks passed locally.

live.evidence: D-1 and D-3 evidence records show production robots/sitemap/feed/static route mismatches and soft-404/private-route behavior on the live host. These were not converted into passes.

browser.evidence: No new Phase D browser crawl or interaction run was supplied in this final wrap-up. Browser and live smoke remain Phase E evidence work.

platform.evidence: Search Console, Google Business Profile, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, and field Core Web Vitals readbacks were unavailable.

owner.evidence: Owner-approved business facts, GBP/citation corrections, product policy approvals, content claim proof, legal/privacy approvals, and finance definitions were unavailable.

content.evidence: D-5 source hardening removed internal governance copy from public service pages, softened unsupported claims, and added a repeatable public claim guard; owner proof remains blocked.

conversion.evidence: D-4 renamed booking submit success to booking_submitted, reserved booking_completed for fulfilled service, and recorded analytics/reconciliation/consent blockers.

local_commerce.evidence: D-2 and D-3 record GBP/citation conflicts, unavailable Merchant Center diagnostics, live feed mismatch, and product policy approval blockers.

task_rollup.task: D-1 - Search Console And Indexing Evidence Readback
primary_blockers: live robots/sitemap/product sitemap assets not served correctly
private and unknown live routes still return public HTML in D-1 evidence

task_rollup.task: D-2 - Google Business Profile, Citations, And Business Fact Approval
primary_blockers: citation conflicts for email and hours
owner approval unavailable for NAP, categories, services, photos, reviews, and special hours

task_rollup.task: D-3 - Merchant Center Feed Diagnostics And Product Policy Approval
primary_blockers: production merchant feed and product sitemap URLs return HTML in D-3 evidence
owner/legal approval unavailable for shipping, pickup, installation, returns, warranty, stock, delivery, condition, and fitment policy

task_rollup.task: D-4 - Analytics, Events, Booking/Order Reconciliation, And Consent Gate
primary_blockers: finance-approved VAT, fee, refund, margin, contribution, CAC, and revenue windows unavailable

task_rollup.task: D-5 - Content, Claims, Reviews, Media, And Local/Service Owner Approval
primary_blockers: owner proof unavailable for reviews, ratings, customer counts, certifications, equipment, warranty, waiting-room amenities, tire-hotel insurance/liability, original media, service reviewer identity, and guide/category source briefs
GBP/citation and Merchant/product policy blockers remain carried
live raw HTML/static asset blockers remain carried

verification.command: /Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Return PASS or FAIL for npm run build, include the final Vite build status line, TypeScript/build errors, and warnings. Do not include the full asset list." -- npm run build

Source static assets checked: 6 files; Merchant feed items: 31528.
Product sitemap check passed: 60918 URLs across 2 files.
Private route boundary check passed: 19 protected redirect rules and 10 header blocks verified.

verification.command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const files=[".growth-work/measurement/search-console-indexing-d1.json",".growth-work/measurement/google-business-profile-citations-d2.json",".growth-work/measurement/merchant-center-feed-diagnostics-d3.json",".growth-work/measurement/analytics-events-reconciliation-consent-d4.json",".growth-work/reports/content-claims-owner-approval-d5.json",".growth-work/measurement/event-dictionary.json",".growth-work/measurement/booking-order-reconciliation.json"]; for (const file of files) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,"utf8")); console.log(`json ok: ${files.length} files`);'

if rg -n "Content review|Business/service owner review required|growth-ready|owner approval|owner-approved|owner approved|review required|source pending|\[TBD\]" src/config src/i18n src/components/site src/components/catalog src/utils -g '!**/*.map'; then exit 1; else echo 'forbidden public governance and TBD scan passed'; fi
verification.result: forbidden public governance and TBD scan passed

verification.command:
zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail; source ~/.config/projects/bin/project; project mitraauto >/dev/null; printf "PROJECT_SLUG=%s
PROJECT_DIR=%s
SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF=%s
SUPABASE_URL=%s
PUBLIC_BASE_URL=%s
GSC_PROPERTY=%s
GBP_LOCATION=%s
MERCHANT_CENTER=%s
GA4_PROPERTY=%s
" "${PROJECT_SLUG:-missing}" "${PROJECT_DIR:-missing}" "${SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF:-missing}" "${SUPABASE_URL:-missing}" "${PUBLIC_BASE_URL:-missing}" "${GOOGLE_SEARCH_CONSOLE_PROPERTY:-${GSC_PROPERTY_URL:-missing}}" "${GBP_LOCATION_ID:-${GOOGLE_BUSINESS_PROFILE_LOCATION:-missing}}" "${MERCHANT_CENTER_ACCOUNT_ID:-${GOOGLE_MERCHANT_CENTER_ACCOUNT:-missing}}" "${GA4_PROPERTY_ID:-${GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_PROPERTY:-missing}}"'
verification.result: Target project confirmed as mitraauto; Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, GA4, and public base URL metadata are missing.

open_blockers.blocker: Authenticated Search Console ownership, sitemap submission, URL Inspection, indexing, manual action, security, enhancement, and performance readbacks are unavailable.
GBP readback, citation cleanup, NAP/hours/category/services/photos/reviews approval, duplicate/suspension status, and alias decision are unavailable or unresolved.
D-1/D-3 live evidence shows production static SEO assets, product sitemaps, Merchant feed, private route denial, and soft-404 behavior are not production-parity yet.
Merchant Center diagnostics and owner/legal product policy approvals are unavailable.
Analytics destination readback, server outcome exports, finance definitions, lifecycle statuses, and privacy/legal approval are unavailable.
Owner proof for reviews, ratings, customer counts, facility and technician claims, warranty, tire-hotel liability, original media, service reviewer identity, and guide/category briefs is unavailable.

release_recommendation: Proceed to Phase E verification and handoff work only as a blocked launch-readiness closeout. Do not classify Mitra Auto as growth-ready until provider readbacks, owner approvals, live production static/HTTP evidence, browser smoke, drift baseline, and final readiness classification pass or receive explicit owner-approved exceptions with mitigation and expiry.
no_guarantee_statement: This Phase D audit improves implementation quality, evidence governance, and measurement readiness. It does not guarantee crawling, indexing, Google-selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, or AI citations.
